title: Report of the Chief Electoral Officer for Northern Ireland 2024-2025
body: "This Annual Report covers the period from 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025. It was a year of significant delivery for the Electoral Office, most notably the administration of the 2024 United Kingdom General Election, held on 4 July 2024.  Ordered by the House of Commons to be printed on 11 November 2025.  "
